$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: measurementMagneticField
description: Vector magnetic field.  Represents the magnetic field strength along sensor x, y, and z axes as defined in mounting.  May represent 1-D, 2-D, or 3-D measurement

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

numMeas.description: num_meas: Dimension of measurement provided.  May be 1, 2, or 3.

xFieldStrength.description: x_field_strength: Field strength of magnetic field in nanoTesla (nT).  Units: nT

yFieldStrength.description: y_field_strength: Field strength of magnetic field in nanoTesla (nT).  Units: nT

zFieldStrength.description: z_field_strength: Field strength of magnetic field in nanoTesla (nT).  Units: nT

covariance.description: covariance: Measurement error variance or covariance depending on measurement dimension.  Units: (nT)^2 Dimensions of covariance must be num_meas²

errorModel.description: error_model (enum): Defines an optional error model for other than zero-mean, additive, white Gaussian noise (AWGN).

oneOf.description: NONE: No additional error model provided (num_error_model_params = 0).

numErrorModelParams.description: num_error_model_params: Number of parameters required for the error model chosen.

errorModelParams.description: error_model_params: Error model parameters that characterize the optional error model.  Units: various

integrity.description: integrity: Measurement integrity.  Includes the integrity method used and an integrity value (which is to be interpreted based upon the integrity method).  The intent of allowing num_integrity > 1 is to report multiple integrity values based on multiple integrity methods.
